description_long: This is a long-handled axe featuring a robust, dark metallic blade securely mounted to a wooden shaft. The handle is primarily brown with visible red accents, and it tapers slightly towards the bottom, ending in a metal pry bar or hook, suggesting a dual-purpose design. The blade is wide, single-edged, and has a slightly curved cutting edge, with a pronounced beard and a flat poll opposite the edge. The mounting of the blade appears traditional, with a visible wedge securing it to the handle. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing some wear and the metal parts exhibiting a slightly rough, utilitarian texture. No visible brand markings or decorative engravings are present, emphasizing its functional, work-oriented design.
description: A long-handled axe with a wide, single-edged metal blade and a wooden shaft featuring red accents and a hooked metal end, designed for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the full length of the handle and the broad, dark blade at the top.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the width and curvature of the blade, as well as the red accents along the wooden handle.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view showing the thickness of the blade and the hooked metal end of the handle.
description_view_3: A clear side profile of the axe, displaying the full blade shape and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a round cross-section, brown with red painted accents, ending in a metal pry bar hook; no visible grip texture.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wide steel blade with a curved cutting edge, pronounced beard, and flat poll; utilitarian with no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible wedge securing the blade to the wooden handle.
